Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire  BBC
IRGC claims it shot down MQ-9 reaper drone, fired at F-35 and intel drone over Iranian airspace  The Jerusalem Post
Iran claims it downed US drone and forced other aircraft to retreat  TRT World
May 24: Iran claims it downed an Israeli surveillance drone; IDF says not familiar with incident  The Times of Israel
Iran Claims It Shot Down US' MQ-9 Drone Amid Peace Talks  NDTV
